message:
chore(deps): bump asupersync dependency from path-only to v0.2.0

The asupersync dependency previously used a bare path reference without
a version constraint. This adds the version = "0.2.0" specifier alongside
the existing local path, aligning with the crates.io published version
and ensuring cargo resolves the correct semver-compatible release when
the local path is unavailable (e.g., in CI or on contributor machines).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
